seoTitle: Mount Evelyn vs Mount Franklin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Evelyn and Mount Franklin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Evelyn vs Mount Franklin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Evelyn and Mount Franklin.
heading: Mount Evelyn vs Mount Franklin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Evelyn, Victoria and Mount Franklin, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Franklin has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Mount Evelyn (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Evelyn or Mount Franklin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Evelyn has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Mount Franklin scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Evelyn scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Franklin scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Evelyn or Mount Franklin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Franklin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
